title: Halloween Parade
description: A spooky-sweet morning of costumes, treats, and a parade around the garden.

title: Thanksgiving Feast
description: Children shared a communal meal and learned about gratitude and friendship.

title: Christmas Concert
description: Our little artists painted and created colorful masterpieces.

title: New Year Kick-off
description: Setting little goals for the year ahead with crafts and sparkling juice toasts.

title: Valentine Day
description: Kids enjoyed friendly games of soccer and relay races.

title: Mothers' Day
description: Engaging stories that spark imagination and curiosity.

title: Easter Egg Hunt
description: An outdoor adventure searching for hidden surprises across the playground.

title: Spring Garden Day
description: Getting hands-on with nature as we plant sunflowers and learn about local bees.

title: Summer Graduation
description: Celebrating our graduates with a special ceremony and ice cream social.
